titleStmt.title: SII 16.102: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 102. (A.R. No. 545 of 1919.) LITTLE KĀÑCHĪPURAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Āruḷāḷaperumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Phālguṇa ba. 4, [Friday] corresponding to 1538 A.D., March 14.

Records that in the year Virōdhi on the day of Kārtika bahuḷa-pañchami on the occasion of his coronation, king Achyutarāya directed Sāḷuva-Kṛishṇappa-nāyaka to assign villages to the temples of Varadarāju and Ēkāṁbaranātha equally, neither more nor less. But as Sāḷuva-nāyaka gave more to Ēkāṁbaranātha, Achyutarāya hearing this, equalised the number of villages by redistribution.
This is a copy of the Tamil version of No. 544 of 1919.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūvarāyaragaṁḍa Ari rāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkkara bhāṣaikkutappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū¨rva dakṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhīśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra Accutaya dēvamahārāyalu pṛdhvī rājyaṁcēya navadhariṁcina śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1454 Agunēṭi naṁdanasaṁvatsara bālguṇa ba 4 śuyaṁdu śrīvīra Accutarāyamahārāyalu prāku virōdhi saṁ vatsara kā¨rtika ba 5 nāṁḍu paṭṭābhiṣēgastuṁḍai viṣṇukaṁci varadarājadēvarakunnu Ēkāṁbranādhunikinni samamugānu tama paṭṭābhiṣēka kālamaṁ
ṁ du sama¨rpiṁcina grāmaṁbula [sama¨rpiṁcamani] sāḷuva kṛiṣṇamanāyanki Ippiṁpanu Āna tiyyaṁgānu Ā sāḷuva nāyaṁḍunu tana kāṇācikaṁgānu grāmaṁbulanu Ēkāṁbra nādhanki Ekkuḍugā viḍici varadarāja dēvunki kodavaṁgā viḍuvaṁgānu Ā venukanu svāmigrāmaṁbulanu vakkaṁṭi takkuvagā viḍici Uṁḍaṁgānu parāmarsiṁci samamugānu sama¨rpiṁccina grāmaṁbulakunnu vivaramu . varadarājadēvarakūnu śiyapuraṁ pallelu 4 guṁ gūḍānu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 450 Akāḷi vellūru palligūḍānu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 450 maṇṇūrku pallelu mūḍunu grāmaṁ
ṁ 1 ki ga 60 Ipaṭṭe grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 85 tinayinēri sī¨rmayilōna dēvādāya brahma dāyaṁbu velivagānu pallelu nnu gūḍānu grāmaṁ 1 ga 95 pālayūru pallelu gūḍānu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 500 gaṁgavaramu grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 1515 veraśigrāmaṁ bulu 7 kinni ga 2505 7 kinni svāmi rāyasaprākārānaku Ēkāṁbranādhanikinni viḍicina Akkāḷivellūru grāmaṁ 1 ki ga 405 poṁgānu nilcina grāmaṁbulu 6 ṭikinni ga 2100 kinni vrayamu naivēdya kaṭṭaḍa prāku svāmi kaṭṭaḍa śēśina paḷyālu 54 kunnu Atirasapaḍi 2 nnu dudhyanna paḷyālu 2 nnu tiruvattiśāma paḷyā
ṁ lu nālgu dīpālu 50 kinni prāku kaṭṭaḍa śēśina ga 1000 pōṁgānu Ā dinamunuṁci svāmi rāyasa prakārānakuṁ ga kaṭaḍiśēsina varadarājaṁmagāri Ubhayamu puḷugāpu Ēkādaśi 1 ki ga 40 lekhanu Ēṁḍu 1 ki Ēkādaśi 25kinni ga 1000 komāra veṁkaṭādri Ayyavāri Ubhayaṁ dadhyanna paḷyālu 2 kinni saṁbā biyyaṁ na peṟugu śuṁṭhi Āvālu Uppu miriyālu jīlaka ṟralu meṁtuḷlu paccaḷlu 4 kinni nela 1 ki ga 3Ø2Ø lekhanu Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 36 svāmi Ubhayaṁ pallaki śēvakucēyanu tiruviḷaku paṁculaku dinaṁ 1 ki nūne � 1 ki ve
ṁ 9 ga lekhanu Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 360 Ēkāṁta Avasaramaṁdu Āragiṁcēṭṭi tiruvattiśāma vaḷyālu 2 ki saṁbābiyaṁ na 1 nnu pālamudu neyyamudu cakkera paṁḍḍu teṁkkā yalu kaṟiyamudulaku nela 1 ki ga 3 Ö lekhanu Ēṁḍu 1 ki ga 42 Aḍikāyamudu dinaṁ 1ki pōṁkalu 50 tamalapākulu 100 yī lekhanu Ēṁḍu 1 ki pōṁkalu 600 ki gā Þ Ö 5 tamalapākulu 3600 ku ga 1Ö veraśi ga 3Ø6 perumāḷlaku cāttanu dinaṁ 1 ki gaṁdhaṁ palaṁ 1 lekhanu Ēṁḍu 1 ki palālu 360 ki Ö 1 ki palālu 6 lekhanu ga 60 veraśi ga 2126Ö6 yī naivēdyaprasādaṁ dadhyannaṁ ṁ tiruvattiśāvāḍi Atirasa The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 16.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
